  children={"List all artifacts"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/artifacts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all artifacts for the caller's tenant, ordered by creation time descending.
